special_mechanics.name: Helicopter Control
special_mechanics.description: Player controls a Comanche attack helicopter with overhead perspective and slight 3D twist. Helicopter has limited armor, fuel, and ammunition.

special_mechanics.name: Vehicle Switching
special_mechanics.description: Player can commandeer additional vehicles: motorbike, hovercraft, and F-117 stealth fighter. F-117 has variable height capability, unlimited ammunition, but is more vulnerable to crashes.

physics_values.f117_features: variable height, unlimited ammo, crash vulnerability
physics_values.other_vehicles: motorbike, hovercraft with standard weapon/fuel limits

special_mechanics.name: Weapon System
special_mechanics.description: Progressive weapon loadout: machine guns (unlimited), Hydra rockets (limited), Hellfire missiles (very limited). More powerful weapons carry fewer ammunition.

special_mechanics.name: Resource Management
special_mechanics.description: Armor replenished via power-ups or airlifting rescued friendlies/captives to landing zones. Fuel replenished by collecting fuel barrels. Ammunition replenished by ammo crates.

tier_notes: Tier 2: Empirical/qualitative data only. Game is helicopter-based shoot 'em up with no documented player character movement physics. All documented mechanics relate to vehicle control and weapon systems. No traditional platformer physics (gravity, jump, acceleration) apply to this game.
